title: Deleting a user - docs say content assigned to 'anonymous' AND 'deleted member'(?)
excerpt:
Trying to decide whether to delete or deactivate a user account. Reading the info here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360002426980-How-to-manage-users-on-your-account 
I’m a bit confused by these 2 section…

posts.author: scoobysnack (Christina McGuire)
posts.cookedHtml:
Trying to decide whether to delete or deactivate a user account. Reading the info here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360002426980-How-to-manage-users-on-your-account

I’m a bit confused by these 2 sections, which appear contradictory (but maybe that’s just how I’m interpreting them):

Screenshot 2023-01-12 at 22.16.081384×842 101 KB

So would the content they produced be assigned to ‘anonymous’ or ‘Deleted member’? (The latter I understand can be renamed)

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! You’re right - it is a bit confusing! The answer here is both - the “deleted member” is the anonymous name assigned to the items that used to belong to the person. So instead of “anonymous” the items will say “deleted member”.

I hope this helps clarify but please let me know if not!
